name: reconstruction_rank_sweep_synthetic_seed42_v1
purpose: Screen the repository's existing nine common-basis rank allocations on the prepared public LEAF Synthetic input; never a paper-reproduction claim.

protocol.subject_selection: 30 users selected with seed 42 from the complete valid generated user pool

limitations: The paper's rank-sweep grid, seed protocol, and source input are unavailable.
This output may compare rank allocations only within this declared screening input and budget.
